title: Preparing for Birth
subtitle: Growth and readiness continue
description: By week 30, your baby continues to grow and prepare for life outside the womb. The brain and lungs are developing further, and movements remain strong and regular.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements remain strong and frequent
You may experience increased physical discomfort as your baby grows
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine
Ensure adequate rest and practice good posture

medical_checkups.note: Regular monitoring is important as you move closer to delivery.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks maternal health and fetal growth

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may begin monitoring your baby’s position and growth more closely.

important_note: Your baby is preparing for birth, with key organs continuing to mature.
reassurance: Each week brings your baby closer to being ready for life outside.
medical_disclaimer: Follow your healthcare provider’s advice for all checkups and monitoring.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports continued growth and preparation for birth.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be closely monitored during this stage.
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent management supports a healthy final phase.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports increased blood volume and oxygen supply.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure is essential as you approach delivery.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring may be more frequent.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support ongoing development and metabolic stability.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As you move closer to delivery, managing multiple conditions requires consistent and mindful care.
priority_tips: Maintain a balanced and regular lifestyle
Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care supports a strong and healthy final phase.
